cases.name: speech-ai-pipeline-note
cases.prompt: Take this ASR to emotion to voice cloning diagram and save a professional Obsidian second brain note with related concepts.
assertions: Creates note under an AI subfolder, not vault root
Adds YAML frontmatter with tags, aliases, related links
Creates or links concept notes for ASR, emotion recognition, TTS, voice cloning
Uses explicit Obsidian path links with aliases
Keeps the main note readable and splits deep detail into linked notes

cases.name: article-summary-note
cases.prompt: Summarize this AI article into my Obsidian vault as a second brain note.
assertions: Includes source metadata if source exists
Extracts durable ideas rather than dumping summary
Links to existing concepts and tags professionally
Does not create a long exhausting note when multiple atomic notes are better

cases.name: root-vault-prevention
cases.prompt: Create related concept notes for these terms: RAG, embeddings, vector database.
assertions: Does not create files in vault root
Adds backlinks between related concept notes
Checks for existing notes before creating duplicates
